nodes.label: phase4-problem (depth-decay statement)
nodes.rationale: The depth-decay problem statement: builds->plateaus->decays past ~L5; killed capacity explanations (dead-frac~0, W240 no help, rank a symptom); cause = local objective drifts the rep off the class manifold (a direction failure).

nodes.label: Depth decay (builds->plateaus->decays)
nodes.rationale: SCFF builds class structure ~5 layers then the representation decays; not dead units (dead-frac~0), not width (W240 no help), rank a symptom - the local objective drifts the rep off the class manifold once abstraction saturates. Decay = trigger (task class-abstraction saturates) x multiplier (no preservation term).
